body:
- Uses NCDatasets.jl
- Allows slicing
- Should be fast because a new file is not created for every output time-step (I guess the previous netcdf writer was slow because it created a new file for every output time-step which added a lot of overhead)
- See example for usage (it works on CPU!)

TODO:
- Global and per variable attributes

Edit:
- Needs to be tested
- We need to discuss halo regions (the dimension lengths are not consistent with the array sizes thanks to halo regions)
title: A fast netcdf output writer
